title: cheilanthes smithii
intro: Cheilanthes smithii, also known as the Smith's cloak fern or Australian sword fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes smithii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection. Cheilanthes smithii can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
